name: 1kpldsns5o
text: How does your organisation primarily interact with personal data?
options: ["A. We determine both the purpose and means of processing","B. We process data strictly on instructions from another entity","C. We do both, depending on the context","D. We are unsure / not formally classified"]

name: 1kq27urnuh
text: Does your organisation process personal data of children (individuals below 18 years)?
options: ["A. Yes, as a core part of our business","B. Yes, incidentally","C. No","D. Unsure"]

name: 1kqmda9ij1
text: Does your organisation process digital personal data of individuals located in India?
options: ["A. Yes, exclusively","B. Yes, along with data of individuals outside India","C. No","D. Unsure"]

name: 1krp122ap1
text: How clearly does your organisation define and communicate the specific purpose for which personal data is collected?

name: 1ks0dgp562
text: How effectively does your consent mechanism ensure that consent is free, specific, informed, and unambiguous, rather than bundled or implied?

name: 1ksoh4nuub
text: How easy is it for a Data Principal to withdraw consent, compared to the ease with which consent was given?

name: 1ktrleps3i
text: To what extent can your organisation prove, with records or logs, that valid consent was obtained for each processing activity?

name: 1ku4e3pkr6
text: How well defined are retention periods for different categories of personal data based on purpose and legal requirements?

name: 1kukd8hp33
text: How reliably does your organisation erase or anonymise personal data once the specified purpose is fulfilled or consent is withdrawn?

name: 1kv2bfdbgl
text: How effectively are your Data Processors (vendors, cloud providers) contractually and operationally required to follow the same deletion and retention rules?

name: 1l06lqj1pq
text: How robust are the technical and organisational safeguards implemented to prevent unauthorised access, loss, or misuse of personal data?

name: 1l091me31k
text: How prepared is your organisation to detect, assess, and respond to a personal data breach in a time-bound and structured manner?

name: 1l1ve938qr
text: How clearly defined and tested is your mechanism to notify the Data Protection Board and affected individuals in the event of a personal data breach?

name: 1l24h6gmd4
text: How reliably does your organisation verify the age of users before processing personal data of children?

name: 1l2hp6d11e
text: How effective is your mechanism to obtain and validate verifiable parental or guardian consent?

name: 1l3m9evoqm
text: To what extent does your organisation ensure that children are not subjected to tracking, behavioural monitoring, or targeted advertising?

name: 1l4555dfpj
text: How effectively does your organisation support correction, updating, or erasure of personal data upon request?

name: 1l4r1ll28a
text: How easily can individuals request access to a summary of their personal data and processing activities?

name: 1l56ohb0co
text: How mature and responsive is your grievance redressal mechanism for privacy-related complaints?

name: 1l6jmho6he
text: How actively does senior management or the governing body oversee data protection risks and compliance?

name: 1l6kcjshlr
text: Is there a formally designated individual or function responsible for DPDP compliance?
options: ["A. Yes, formally appointed and documented","B. Yes, informally handled","C. Responsibility is distributed without clarity","D. No specific ownership"]

name: 1l73224l7d
text: How transparent and accessible is your organisation’s privacy notice and contact information for data protection queries?

name: 1l8eijeats
text: If applicable, how effectively are additional SDF obligations (DPO appointment, DPIA, audits) implemented?

name: 1l8ia79as8
text: Has your organisation assessed whether it may qualify as a Significant Data Fiduciary?
options: ["A. Yes, formally assessed","B. Informally considered","C. Not assessed","D. Unsure"]

name: 1l92jque46
text: Where is personal data primarily stored or processed?
options: ["A. India only","B. India and permitted foreign jurisdictions","C. Outside India","D. Unsure"]

name: 1la8ngn3ar
text: Does your organisation rely on any statutory exemptions under the DPDP Act?
